case_title: NEDA AMIRI VS. JOANNA LABRANCH et al

docket_entries.description: AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LORETTA NAJERA. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-28-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-18-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 225 SET FOR JUL-08-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. MAY-28-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE - EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN FEES AND COSTS
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-25-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
